channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Marcos launches housing, food aid, and scholarship programs in Quezon
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. launched the 'Bawat Bayan Makikinabang' program in Lucena City, Quezon, focusing on housing security, food assistance, and educational support. The initiative included d...

item.title: Ethiopia's Inflation Surges Amid Rising Food and Non-Food Costs
item.description: Ethiopia's annual inflation rate climbed to 13.9% in June 2026, marking the highest level in a year, according to the Ethiopian Statistical Service. This rise follows a monthly increase from 13.4% in ...

item.title: Angus Taylor's Focus on One Nation and Questions Over Pauline Hanson's European Trip Funding
item.description: The article discusses the ongoing focus of Australian Coalition leader Angus Taylor on the One Nation party, despite repeated calls for him to address other political issues. It highlights how Taylor ...

item.title: Tanzania seeks to strengthen its position in the global carbon market
item.description: Tanzania is intensifying efforts to capture a larger share of the global carbon market, aiming to transition from passive participation to leadership. The National Carbon Monitoring Centre (NCMC) play...

item.title: Senator-Judges Oppose Subpoena for Sara Duterte's Financial Records
item.description: The Senate impeachment court faces opposition from several senator-judges regarding its decision to subpoena financial records of Vice President Sara Duterte and her husband, Manases Carpio. Impeachme...

item.title: Burnham's Cabinet Shake-Up and Political Shifts in His First 24 Hours as Prime Minister
item.description: Prime Minister Andy Burnham faced significant political upheaval in his first 24 hours in office, with cabinet reshuffles and strategic appointments shaping Labour's agenda. John Healey's unexpected a...

item.title: Trump's legal team seeks to reverse court-ordered payment for sexual assault case
item.description: President Donald Trump's legal team is attempting to overturn a $5.6 million court-ordered payment to writer E. Jean Carroll, who sued him for sexual assault and defamation. A federal jury previously ...

item.title: India's Student Protests Spark Political Shift as Opposition Seeks Youth Support
item.description: Student protests in India have created a political opportunity for opposition parties to gain support from the youth demographic. The movement, initially focused on addressing exam paper leaks and cor...

item.title: Sentencing Delay for Paedophile Iain Wares Amid Health Claims and Extradition Battle
item.description: The sentencing of convicted paedophile Iain Wares has been postponed to August 24 after medical documentation confirmed he was unfit for court until July 28. Wares, 86, faces charges of indecent assau...

item.title: Keir Starmer's Farewell TikTok Video Sparks Online Reaction
item.description: Sir Keir Starmer, the former UK Prime Minister, posted a TikTok video that combined his face with the iconic final scene of the Fast and Furious 7 movie, featuring the No10 Downing Street door. The ed...

item.title: Road Rage Suspect Arrested After High-Speed Chase in Hollywood
item.description: A driver wanted in a road rage incident in Santa Monica earlier this month was arrested after leading police on a high-speed chase through Hollywood on Tuesday morning. The suspect, identified as a ma...

item.title: Senate Hearing Escalates as Peters Confronts Hegseth Over War Funding
item.description: During a contentious Senate hearing on Capitol Hill, Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth and Joint Chiefs Chairman Dan Caine faced sharp criticism from Senator Gary Peters (D-MI). Peters accused Hegseth...

item.title: A Unique $4 Million Home with Biologic Kitchen and Conversation Pit in Hillsborough, California
item.description: This article discusses a one-of-a-kind property located at 45 Berryessa Way in Hillsborough, California, which has been listed on Zillow for $4,225,800 since July 2016. Designed by architect William N...

item.title: Technical Issue Blocks Access to Sunbury Weather Report
item.description: A technical issue has temporarily blocked access to the Sunbury weather report on the Herald Sun website. News Corp Australia uses automated software to manage crawler bot traffic, which can sometimes...

item.title: Toronto Doctor Charged with Possessing Child Sexual Abuse Material
item.description: A 44-year-old doctor at Toronto's Hospital for Sick Children has been arrested and charged with possessing and accessing child sexual abuse and exploitation material, according to police. Dilan Dissan...

item.title: Uganda Airlines Expands Fleet with New Boeing Aircraft
item.description: Uganda Airlines has finalized a deal to purchase eight new Boeing aircraft, marking a significant step in expanding its fleet and strengthening its position in East Africa's aviation market. This acqu...

item.title: Nigeria’s Economic Reforms Miss the Informal Sector Majority
item.description: The article highlights how Nigeria's economic policies largely ignore the informal sector, which employs over 93% of workers. Despite reforms like fuel subsidy removal and exchange rate liberalization...

item.title: First Confirmed Atmosphere Detected on Rocky Exoplanet in Habitable Zone
item.description: Astronomers have discovered the first confirmed atmosphere around a rocky exoplanet located in the habitable zone of a red dwarf star. The planet, LHS 1140 b, is situated 48 light-years from Earth and...

item.title: Nigeria's financial reforms focus on public trust and crisis preparedness
item.description: Nigeria's fiscal and financial authorities are emphasizing the importance of public confidence and crisis readiness to strengthen Africa's financial stability. Finance Minister Taiwo Oyedele highlight...

item.title: Security Guard Dies by Suicide at School, Linked to Psychological Distress
item.description: A 25-year-old security guard at Mailisita Primary School in Hai District, Kilimanjaro Region, was found hanging from a classroom ceiling on July 20, 2026. Police suspect the death is a suicide linked ...
